description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the sonarqube Docker image and defines two stages: build and test. Add a build job in the build stage that runs the before_script `export GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle`, then executes `./gradlew assemble`, caches the directories `.gradle/wrapper` and `.gradle/caches`, publishes the files matching `build/libs/*.jar` as artifacts retained for one week, and runs only on the master branch. Add a test job in the test stage that runs the same before_script and then executes `./gradlew check`, with an after_script that echoes "End CI" after each job. Ensure the cache and artifact settings are applied as specified.
